results.title: Cloviana Free AI Visibility Audit: Free AI visibility audit for B2B SaaS | Product Hunt
results.content:
The free audit gives you the baseline.

Cloviana is being built as an autonomous GEO agent for SaaS companies — monitoring how AI tools talk about your brand, finding the content and citation gaps, and helping execute the work needed to get cited and recommended more often.

The audit is free, and you can run it here.

If you’re a SaaS founder or marketer, check whether AI is recommending you or your competitors.

@samuelcloviana You're welcome [...] Hey Product Hunt,

I’m Samuel, founder of Cloviana.

B2B buyers are starting to research software inside ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews before they ever visit a website.

That creates a new problem:

Your competitors can be recommended, cited, and trusted by AI before your brand even enters the conversation.

So I built a free AI visibility audit for SaaS companies.

It shows:

• How often AI mentions your brand  
• Your citation share vs competitors  
• Competitor leaderboards  
• Sentiment around your brand  
• Blog suggestions to improve visibility

The free audit gives you the baseline. [...] Cloviana Free AI Visibility Audit

Most websites are invisible to Ai models like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude; not because the content is bad, but because the structure fails machine reading. AiVIS audits what Ai actually sees, flags what it misreads or skips, and delivers evidence backed fixes with verified score improvement. Not an SEO tool. An Ai citation readiness platform.

## 100+ checks to get cited by AI search engines

VektorAI audits any URL across SEO, AEO, GEO, and Performance with 100+ checks — covering JSON-LD schemas, E-E-A-T signals, Open Graph, Core Web Vitals, and more. Find exactly what stops ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews from citing your content. Every issue comes with a copy-paste fix. Pro users get AI-powered suggestions tailored to their page context. No signup needed for your first audit — paste a URL and get scored in seconds.
